rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Glenn Lerner's Motion for Summary Adjudication is denied. Triable issues of fact exist regarding the revocability of the Survivor's Trust, the effect of the Agreement Regarding Surviving Settlor's Rights and Duties and the subsequent amendment, the revocability of the Marital Trust and the Family Trust, the limitations imposed on the Trustee in those trusts. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 4, 2011.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Counsel
rulings.Rulings: The substitution of counsel for Lori DeMartini does not eliminate the conflict and requires disqualification. The conflict arises due to the previous concurrent representation of Lori DeMartini and Paul DeMartini, clients with conflicting interests, and which calls into question the duty of loyalty to both clients. Termination of representation of one client and undertaking the successive representation of the other client jeopardizes the fiduciary obligations of confidentiality with the former client. The Motion to Disqualify Counsel is granted. If any party wishes to contest the tentative rulng, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on August 4, 2011.
